name: portfolio-leve-joelcio
description: Pagina de portfolio leve, estatica e responsiva.

scripts.check: node --check script.js && node -e "for (const f of ['index.html','projetos.html','styles.css','script.js','assets/portfolio-visual.svg','assets/project-ovinosync.svg','assets/project-portfolio.svg','assets/project-pontodeapoio.svg']) require('node:fs').accessSync(f)"
